content: You can submit any game-related content. However, in cases where two submissions are of similar quality and the number of award slots is limited, we will prioritize submissions that are more relevant to the latest game content. <@217131427693723664> <@536400230112034827> <@1437487264023318668> <@672042274275721231>
so relevance is just a tiebreaker, thank you <:Salvador_OK:1468258324066734305>
